div.h2: Implementation: Parallel Arrays with Monotonic Clock

tr.td: Sequential scan to find VPN index

p.em: Optimization Note: Replace parallel arrays with a Hash Map + Doubly Linked List for O(1) across all operations.

div.p: When a page fault occurs and a free frame is available, the new Virtual Page Number (VPN) is appended to the tracking structure.

ul.li: Free slot at idx 4 is consumed

div.p: VPN 0x40 is accessed. To maintain LRU order, its timestamp must be updated to the current global clock.
Capacity reached. We must evict the page with the minimum timestamp.

ol.li: Swap tail (idx 4) to idx 0 to maintain contiguous array.
